creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 224704
patch for sysutils/lxterminal

I have used this port for quite some time. I'm doing
some work on x11-wm/icewm and wanted to add this port
as an option. I noticed it's not maintained. So thought
I'd pick it up.

Changes
Makefile (MAINTAINER)

That's it.

When this gets committed. You can assign to to
[bug #237333]

Thanks!
